summary: Iter-58 review (11 P0 user-requested changes). Backend 8/8 new + 26/26 regression PASSED (34/34). Frontend smoke confirms: nav-testimonials + mobile-nav-testimonials, video-testimonials moved AFTER how-it-works (vtTop=1460 > hiTop=69), testimonials-track horizontally scrolls (overflow-x:auto, scrollWidth=1485px @ mobile), all 3 DualCTA blocks render with patient+therapist sub-buttons, logo-link returns to / and scrolls to top, signin method toggle works (Password ↔ Email code), admin auto-decline-duplicates-banner shows 11 + 11 duplicate-warning badges, site-copy panel mounts with 13 rows + save/reset/custom-key/custom-value/custom-save controls, PatientResults submit-another CTAs removed, mobile audit at 390x844 = no horizontal overflow on Landing/SignIn/TherapistJoin/Admin.

verifications.T1_auto_decline_duplicates: Banner data-testid=auto-decline-duplicates-banner + auto-decline-duplicates-btn render with text '11 pending applicants cover only axes we already have 5+ providers for.' POST /api/admin/therapists/auto-decline-duplicates with {dry_run:true} returns matched=N, rejected_ids=[], preview[] (≤20). Pending count unchanged after dry_run. Backend tests 3/3 PASS.
verifications.T2_panels_extracted: PendingTherapistsPanel renders 11 duplicate-warning badges. Site copy panel + match-gap (iter-57 verified) render in dialogs. Tab list confirmed: requests, therapists, all_therapists, patients, completion, master_query, more-btn.
verifications.T3_signin_method_toggle: signin-method-password + signin-method-code pill toggles render at /sign-in?role=patient. Clicking Password reveals password input. Clicking Email code reveals 'Send me a code' button. Both paths user-selectable.
verifications.T4_5_testimonials_position_and_nav: video-testimonials-section vtTop=1460.125 > how-it-works hiTop=69 → AFTER. Track always overflow-x:auto (no grid breakpoint). Desktop nav-testimonials + mobile-nav-testimonials links present.
verifications.T6_patient_results_cta_removed: submit-another-request-btn AND submit-another-request-section both = null on /portal/patient/results/<token>.
verifications.T7_mobile_audit_390x844: Landing/SignIn/TherapistJoin/Admin all doc.scrollWidth=390==clientWidth → no horizontal overflow. Burger opens drawer with mobile-nav-testimonials. signin-method-password is 137x36 (tap-friendly).
verifications.T8_stripe_back_preservation: Code-confirmed in TherapistSignup.jsx (sessionStorage tv_signup_pending). Live retest deferred — no fresh email available without Stripe key — non-blocking.
verifications.T9_logo_navigation: On / scroll=1500 → click logo-link → scrollY=0. On /therapists/join → click logo-link → url=/. Both behaviours correct.
verifications.T10_dual_cta_blocks: All 3 testids present: dual-cta-after-testimonials, dual-cta-after-intake, dual-cta-after-faq. Each has dual-cta-patient-btn + dual-cta-therapist-btn.
verifications.T11_site_copy_editor: GET /api/site-copy = public ✓; admin GET/PUT/DELETE round-trip = ✓ (8 backend tests). Panel mounts at More → Site copy with 13 rows, copy-save-landing.hero.eyebrow + copy-reset-landing.hero.eyebrow + copy-custom-key + copy-custom-value + copy-custom-save-btn all present. Existing override 'Live in Idaho — and growing' rendered.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx still ~3966 lines after iter-58 refactor. Next pass could extract SiteCopyAdminPanel rendering wrapper if more admin tabs are added. Low priority.
Site copy 60s in-memory cache (useSiteCopy.js) means edits take up to 60s to surface — UX-acceptable per spec but document on the admin panel.

Auto-decline endpoint fires asyncio.create_task per row for emails — for >100 pending applicants this could hit Resend rate limits; consider chunked sleep (e.g. 100ms between sends). Currently 11 rows so non-blocking.
test_credentials: Admin master pwd: admin123! via X-Admin-Password header (NOT cookie-based — backend admin_login does not set httpOnly cookie; auth is stateless via header or Bearer JWT for team accounts).
seed_data_creation: test_iteration58_site_copy.py generates ephemeral keys 'test.iter58.<uuid8>' and DELETEs them at end of round-trip test. Auto-decline test runs ONLY in dry_run mode — no real reject performed, leaving the 11 seeded pending duplicates intact for downstream UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-58 fully green. New backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration58_site_copy.py covers /api/site-copy public + /api/admin/site-copy admin CRUD + /api/admin/therapists/auto-decline-duplicates dry_run. Run with cwd=/app/backend and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env set. Admin auth uses X-Admin-Password header (not cookie). The 11 pending duplicate-roster therapists are intentionally preserved by tests — do not run a non-dry_run auto-decline in CI or future iterations will lose the seed. Stripe back-button restore (T8) was code-confirmed only; main agent can self-test by submitting fresh therapist signup and reloading.
rca of the issue: N/A — review iteration, no bugs found.
